allow: PowerShell(Set-Location C:\\dev\\bots-site; $p = Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c npm run dev > C:\\Temp\\nextdev.log 2>&1" -PassThru -WorkingDirectory "C:\\dev\\bots-site"; Write-Output "Started PID $\($p.Id\)"; Start-Sleep 25; Get-Content C:\\Temp\\nextdev.log)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\) | Size: $\($r.Content.Length\)"; $cssMatch = [regex]::Match\($r.Content, 'href="\(/_next/static/css/[^"]+\)"'\); $cssUrl = $cssMatch.Groups[1].Value; Write-Output "CSS URL: $cssUrl")

PowerShell($r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/_next/static/css/app/layout.css?v=1778222917475" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "CSS status: $\($r2.StatusCode\) | Size: $\($r2.Content.Length\) bytes"; $r2.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(800, $r2.Content.Length\)\))

PowerShell($r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/_next/static/css/app/layout.css?v=1778222917475" -UseBasicParsing; $css = $r2.Content; Write-Output "=== bg-bg-deep ==="; if \($css -match '#0A0A14|0a0a14'\) { Write-Output "FOUND bg-deep color" } else { Write-Output "NOT found" }; Write-Output "=== antialiased ==="; if \($css -match 'antialiased'\) { Write-Output "FOUND" } else { Write-Output "NOT found" }; Write-Output "=== @tailwind base output ==="; if \($css -match 'box-sizing: border-box'\) { Write-Output "FOUND Tailwind base" } else { Write-Output "NOT found - Tailwind not processing" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 40; Write-Output "Page: $\($r.StatusCode\) | $\($r.Content.Length\)b"; $cssMatch = [regex]::Match\($r.Content, 'href="\(/_next/static/css/[^"]+\)"'\); $cssUrl = $cssMatch.Groups[1].Value; Write-Output "CSS URL: $cssUrl"; Start-Sleep 2; $css = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$cssUrl" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "CSS: $\($css.StatusCode\) | $\($css.Content.Length\)b"; if \($css.Content -match '#0A0A14'\) { Write-Output "✓ Dark theme color present" }; if \($css.Content -match 'box-sizing: border-box'\) { Write-Output "✓ Tailwind base present" }; if \($css.Content -match 'antialiased'\) { Write-Output "✓ Tailwind utilities present" })
